BUU-CANDY_SHELL.title: Candy Shell
BUU-CANDY_SHELL.description: Start each combat with 4 [gold]Ki[/gold]. At the start of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Ki[/gold].
BUU-MAJIN_CREST.title: Majin Crest
BUU-MAJIN_CREST.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Ki[/gold].
BUU-ABSORPTION_CELL.title: Absorption Cell
BUU-ABSORPTION_CELL.description: At the start of combat, gain 3 [gold]Ki[/gold].
BUU-REGENERATION_POD.title: Regeneration Pod
BUU-REGENERATION_POD.description: At the start of your turn, heal 1 HP.
